error.capacity_details: ngidinga ama-bits angu-%d, umthamo omkhulu ku-k=1 yi-bits engu-%d
error.insufficient_capacity: umlayezo mkhulu kakhulu kumthamo we-coefficient otholakalayo
error.insufficient_coefficients: ama-coefficient anganele ngesikhathi sokushumeka: kudingeka %d, ngithole %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: ama-coefficient anganele okusebenziseka kokushumeka kwekhanda: kudingeka ama-bits angu-32, kutholakale ama-coefficients asebenzisekayo angu-%d kuphela
error.invalid_coefficient_range: inani le-coefficient lingaphandle kobubanzi obuvumelekile (-2048 kuya ku-2047)
error.invalid_force_k: I-ForceK engavumelekile: kumele ibe ngu-0 (ngokuzenzakalela) noma u-1-8
error.invalid_k_parameter: ipharamitha ka-k kumele ibe phakathi kuka-1 no-8
error.matrix_encode_failed: ukufaka ikhodi ye-matrix kwehlulekile ku-code word: %v
error.message_too_large: usayizi womlayezo udlula inani eliphezulu elivunyelwe (amabhayithi angu-8,388,607)
error.nil_random_source: umthombo ongahleliwe awukwazi ukuba yize: sebenzisa i-InitializePRNG(password) noma unikeze i-RandomSource ehlwanyelwe kusengaphambili
